layers.label: Layer 0 - Keep Current Backup Flow Safe
layers.description: Protect the working local registration flow and remove operational blockers.

items.title: Separate PDF attachments
items.detail: Generate each selected component form as its own PDF and attach all generated PDFs to one single email.

items.title: Admin workflow setup
items.detail: Add a staff-facing setup screen for diver type, activity type, and PDF outputs.

items.title: Server-side form defaults
items.detail: Enforce activity-based output defaults on the backend so stale browser payloads cannot drop required forms.

items.title: Admin password gate
items.detail: Protect the admin setup route with a simple password.

items.title: Guest submit lock and spinner
items.detail: While a form is submitting, prevent page interaction and show a centered progress state until PDF/email work completes.

items.title: Polished submit success/error modal
items.detail: Replace browser alert popups with an in-page completion state: spinner becomes a green tick on success, and errors show in the same modal.

items.title: Mobile signature pad fix
items.detail: Resize signature canvases with device-pixel scaling and touch-aware pointer handling so ink follows the finger on phones.

items.title: Guest form cleanup
items.detail: Remove the admin setup link/status strip and remove the preview JSON from the guest-facing form.

items.title: DB failure should not block PDFs
items.detail: Reconcile current code with the intended backup behavior: if Postgres is down, still generate/save/email PDFs and log the DB failure clearly.

items.title: Submission smoke-test checklist
items.detail: Create a repeatable manual test checklist for course, fun dive, course plus fun dive, minor, both-center, LAN QR, public QR, and mobile signature submissions.

items.title: Server-side validation
items.detail: Add minimal backend validation for required identity fields, centers, DOB, email, signatures, and medical answers.

items.title: Operator-facing failure recovery
items.detail: Make failed email/DB/PDF states obvious to staff, with clear next steps and enough saved artifacts to recover manually.

layers.label: Layer 1 - Operational Admin Tools
layers.description: Give staff visibility and recovery tools during real-world operations.

items.title: One-click Windows launcher
items.detail: Add a root launcher script that starts the Node server from the right folder and opens admin in the browser.

items.title: Launch dashboard with QR codes
items.detail: Add an admin launch view showing local, LAN, and optional public guest/admin links with QR codes.

items.title: Offline QR generation
items.detail: Generate QR SVGs locally from the backend so QR display does not depend on an external QR service.

items.title: Public URL readiness check
items.detail: Check configured public/tunnel URL against /healthz and show reachable/error status without replacing LAN fallback.

items.title: Ngrok launcher support
items.detail: Let Start Dive Forms.bat read PUBLIC_BASE_URL/PUBLIC_TUNNEL_PROVIDER and start an ngrok tunnel through PowerShell when configured.

items.title: Roadmap kanban tab
items.detail: Add a roadmap data file and admin kanban renderer for tracking product work.

items.title: PDF coordinate mapper link
items.detail: Add an admin link to the existing frontend PDF coordinate mapper utility.

items.title: Future pathway placeholders
items.detail: Show planned XR, freediving, and snorkeling paperwork pathways in admin without enabling unmapped forms.

items.title: Pathway development workspace
items.detail: Let admin click planned pathways, review forms/rules/questions, track readiness, and save local notes before implementation.

items.title: Submission browser
items.detail: Admin view for recent DB submissions with search by name, email, phone, and center.

items.title: Regenerate submission PDFs
items.detail: Allow staff to rerun PDF filling for a selected DB submission, then download admin-protected generated files.

items.title: Resend email action
items.detail: Allow staff to resend regenerated PDFs for a selected submission as one email to a specified address.

items.title: Repo-local working memory
items.detail: Add project instructions and memory files so future sessions know the app purpose, form rules, roadmap sync rule, and commit habits.

items.title: Test mode controls
items.detail: Add a visible admin control for test mode/local-save behavior instead of relying on query params or headers.

items.title: Environment health panel
items.detail: Show DB status, SMTP status, forms directory status, dependency status, configured public URL, and active LAN URL in the admin panel.

items.title: Launcher process management
items.detail: Detect already-running Node/ngrok processes, avoid duplicate tunnel errors, and give staff a clean restart/stop/reuse path.

items.title: Launch QR print/share view
items.detail: Provide a staff-friendly full-screen or printable QR page for guests, with LAN and public options clearly labeled.

items.title: Public tunnel hardening
items.detail: Keep ngrok working now, then decide whether to stay on ngrok or move to Cloudflare Tunnel/Tailscale Funnel for regular operations.

layers.label: Layer 2 - Form Coverage and Polish
layers.description: Expand coverage to additional activity pathways and polish PDF completeness.

items.title: Extensible form catalog
items.detail: Replace hardcoded form keys/rules with a catalog that can represent scuba, XR, freediving, snorkeling, student, and fun-diver pathways.

items.title: PDF intake and mapping workflow
items.detail: Define where new source PDFs are stored, how they are named, how coordinate maps are created, and how a mapped PDF becomes selectable.

items.title: Pathway source PDF inventory
items.detail: Create a checklist of missing PDFs for XR, freediving, snorkeling, and any center-specific variants before mapping begins.

items.title: Promote pathway workspace to implementation queue
items.detail: Convert a ready planned pathway into code tasks for form catalog entries, PDF files, coordinate maps, output rules, and smoke tests.

items.title: Output rule matrix editor
items.detail: Move the diver/activity/form matrix toward data-driven admin configuration while preserving backend safety defaults.

items.title: Medical contact fields
items.detail: Finish coordinate mapping for email/phone fields on the medical PDF.

items.title: XR pathway
items.detail: Add Extended Range support, including XR waiver and XR RDC source PDFs, coordinate maps, and activity-to-output rules.

items.title: Freediving fun diver pathway
items.detail: Define, load, map, and route the paperwork needed for certified/non-student freediving guests.

items.title: Freediving student pathway
items.detail: Define, load, map, and route the paperwork needed for freediving students.

items.title: Snorkeling fun diver pathway
items.detail: Define, load, map, and route the paperwork needed for snorkeling guests.

items.title: Snorkeling student pathway
items.detail: Define, load, map, and route the paperwork needed for snorkeling students.

items.title: Center expansion support
items.detail: Make facility names, center codes, and per-center outputs data-driven for future DIVEIndia locations.

layers.label: Layer 3 - Cloud Infrastructure and Sync
layers.description: Railway (Postgres + hosting) + Cloudflare R2 (templates). Phone is a thin local gateway. Cloud is source of truth. Offline = local cache + submission queue, not a separate mode.

items.title: Railway Postgres provisioning
items.detail: Add Postgres service to Railway project. Run existing DB migration. Swap DATABASE_URL and verify submissions save correctly.

items.title: Railway backend deploy
items.detail: Deploy existing backend/server.js to Railway. Verify all routes work at the Railway URL. Set required env vars.

items.title: Cloudflare R2 bucket setup
items.detail: Create R2 bucket for templates. Generate API key pair. Configure CORS for admin uploads. Store credentials in Railway env vars.

items.title: Upload existing templates to R2
items.detail: Upload current PDF source files and a JSON export of coordMap entries to R2 as the initial baseline.

items.title: Template version manifest
items.detail: Store a manifest.json in R2 listing each template with a content hash and timestamp. Backend serves it at /admin/api/templates/manifest.

items.title: Admin template upload UI
items.detail: Staff upload new PDFs or coordMap JSON via admin panel. Files go to R2. Manifest updates automatically. Old version kept with timestamp suffix.

items.title: Phone template sync
items.detail: On startup, phone fetches manifest, compares hashes against local cache, downloads only changed files. Uses cache if Railway is unreachable.

items.title: Local submission queue
items.detail: When Railway is unreachable, phone saves full submission payload to local JSON queue with UUID. PDF generation still happens immediately.

items.title: Background queue flush
items.detail: Phone runs background interval checking connectivity and posting queued submissions to Railway. Item removed from queue only after confirmed 2xx response.

items.title: Queue status in admin
items.detail: Launch tab shows number of pending unsynced submissions and a manual sync now button.

layers.label: Layer 4 - Android Staff Launcher
layers.description: Any staff member runs the server from their own Android phone. Templates from R2 cache. Submissions to Railway with offline queue fallback. Validate with Termux first, then APK.

items.title: Termux setup guide
items.detail: Step-by-step guide for non-technical staff: Termux, Node.js, git clone, .env setup, start server.

items.title: Termux startup script
items.detail: One-command start.sh: pull latest, install deps if needed, start server. Staff type one thing.

items.title: Validate LAN peer-to-peer connectivity
items.detail: Test whether phones on dive center WiFi can reach each other. Document hotspot fallback if client isolation blocks it.

items.title: Validate Android background network
items.detail: Confirm server stays reachable when operator phone screen locks. Document battery and permission settings required.

items.title: nodejs-mobile-react-native scaffold
items.detail: React Native project with embedded Node.js runtime. Confirm backend/server.js starts inside it. Phase B after Termux validates concept.

items.title: Android foreground service
items.detail: Wrap Node.js server in a foreground service so OS does not kill it when screen locks. Show persistent notification while running.

items.title: Native operator UI
items.detail: Minimal React Native screen: Start/Stop button, LAN QR code, active submission count, queue pending count.

items.title: APK update and distribution path
items.detail: Decide how staff get new versions: sideload via WhatsApp/shared drive, Play Store internal track, or similar.

items.title: WiFi hotspot mode fallback
items.detail: Document the flow where operator phone creates its own hotspot — fully air-gapped from venue WiFi.
